tasks.title: Freeze knowledge ingestion taxonomy and source roles
Define first migration pack and exclusion gate
Define canonical knowledge item template for content-ko
Manually migrate 8-15 low-risk knowledge items (Pack 001)
Execute migration pack 002: Core Particles & Connectors
Validate links and artifact compatibility with migrated pack
Evaluate schema extensions for aliases, source refs, and teaching blocks
Prototype normalizer script after manual pack proves stable
notes: Superseded by the current skill-driven ingestion workflow and hardening gate.
Normalization/validation responsibilities are now covered by the manual-first skill flow and task-level gates.

tasks.title: [V0 Draft] Define example sentence bank schema and link contract (initial draft)
Freeze EXAMPLE_SENTENCE_BANK_SCHEMA_V1 defining formal required/recommended fields, provenance, quality flags, and core/i18n boundaries
[Umbrella] Define CANONICAL_SENTENCE_GRAPH mapping for source -> example -> knowledge -> topic cross-links
Bootstrap example sentence bank from legacy sources and mark quality/segmentation readiness (initial source bootstrap)
notes: Current skill work is actively digesting 30+ entries toward the bootstrap example sentence bank.
Treat this as the live example-sentence intake/bootstrap path rather than a dormant planning item.

tasks.title: Freeze EXAMPLE_EXTRACTION_POLICY_V1 defining extractable vs in-situ criteria and alignment pass outputs
Extract structured example blocks from mixed knowledge items into canonical bank (excluding freeform MD explanations); depends on extraction policy freeze
notes: Run only after sentence schema freeze, extraction policy freeze, and Knowledge Lab alignment/classification are complete.
This step is for existing Knowledge Lab mixed content only; do not combine with new curriculum-source ingestion.
